description: Configure the store's order numbering system to look more professional. Create a yearly number pattern for the 'Order' entity type labeled 'Urban Electronics Orders'. The pattern must use the prefix 'UE-', followed by the 4-digit year, a hyphen, and a 6-digit padded number. Assign this pattern to the 'Default' order type. The Drupal site is at http://localhost (admin / Admin1234!).
